About Me

Cross-Border
Growth Architect

"Driven by curiosity, resilience, and a passion for solving interesting business challenges, I help companies navigate cultures, build partnerships, and uncover growth opportunities across borders."

Having lived in Germany for nine years, I bring a combination of academic, entrepreneurial, and commercial experience to my work. During my doctoral research, I discovered that I was most energized by building relationships, creating opportunities, and turning ideas into real-world outcomes. An unexpected conversation with a fellow entrepreneur during a flight eventually led to a business partnership, and together we built a boutique premium events company serving private clients in Germany. That experience taught me how to identify opportunities, earn trust quickly, manage client expectations, and grow a business from the ground up.

Building on that entrepreneurial foundation, I transitioned into agency-side consulting and project management, where I now help APAC brands navigate European markets and accelerate growth through strategic partnerships, market-entry initiatives, and brand-building programs.

Today, I work as a Senior Project & Account Manager at KleinS GmbH, a full-service market entry agency supporting APAC brands in their European expansion. Over the years, I have worked with a diverse portfolio of international clients across consumer electronics, retail, technology, manufacturing, renewable energy, logistics, and FMCG sectors, including EcoFlow, OPPO, Alibaba, Anker, AIKO, XGIMI, Geek+, XPENG, MOVA, JD.com, Dreame, MINISO, Minth Group, AgiBot, LONGi, Biostime, China Mobile, Brown-Forman, and Hanshow.

My work spans the full commercial lifecycle — from identifying opportunities and developing client relationships to negotiating contracts, delivering complex projects, and creating long-term partnerships. I have led brand launches, executive conferences, retail activations, dealer events, trade show programs, and market-entry initiatives across Germany, France, Benelux, the Nordics, and Eastern Europe.

What makes me particularly effective in APAC-facing roles is the ability to bridge cultures as well as business objectives. Having spent nearly a decade living and working in Germany while collaborating closely with APAC headquarters and European stakeholders, I understand the different expectations, communication styles, and decision-making processes on both sides. I enjoy bringing people together around a common goal and turning complexity into collaboration.

I believe the best work happens when trust, curiosity, and adaptability come together. Whether working with clients, partners, or colleagues, I aim to be someone who listens carefully, learns continuously, and contributes as a reliable team player in fast-changing international environments.

Beyond Work

Life Outside the Office

Outside of work, I love sports, travel, and exploring new experiences. Yoga, rock climbing, swimming, fitness training, HYROX, and contemporary dance are all part of my life. My sports wishlist keeps getting longer because I am endlessly curious — there is always a new challenge I want to try, and tennis and kite surfing are currently at the top of the list.

I am also a foodie at heart. For me, the best way to experience a new place is through its food — whether it's a hidden local restaurant, a street food market, or a dish recommended by someone who truly knows the city.

On the ground

Independent Entrepreneur
Founder · Premium Events
Co-founded and operated a boutique premium events business serving private clients across Europe. Built the business from the ground up through networking, partnership development, and client referrals, managing the full customer lifecycle from business development and consultation to project delivery and post-event relationship management.

Collaborated with venues, suppliers, and creative partners across multiple European markets to deliver highly customised experiences for international clients.

Earlier
DAAD
Research Associate · German Academic Exchange Service
Contributed to academic and policy-oriented research projects at one of Europe's leading international academic organisations. Applied quantitative research methods including statistical analysis in R and data querying in SQL to support evidence-based findings and structured reporting.

Developed strong skills in research design, data analysis, structured writing, and working within complex institutional frameworks — building the analytical rigour that underpins my commercial approach today.
